company.name: New World Kids — Hermes Operations
company.description: AI-native operations company managing all NWKids repos, programs, and revenue streams. Hermes is the CEO. Zero human intervention required for routine operations.
company.mission: Remove Bambu as operational bottleneck. Every repo becomes a self-improving business. Every KPI is tracked. Every action is logged publicly.

goals.title: Portfolio: All repos bootstrapped with agents + WIKI + KPI
goals.description: Every GitHub repo under executiveusa has a Paperclip company, at least one worker agent, WIKI.md, and KPI.md with 3 measurable metrics.

goals.title: Grant Pipeline: $150K raised in 12 months
goals.description: Hermes finds, applies for, and tracks grants across all NWKids programs. Priority targets: Microsoft AI for Good ($50K), Paul G. Allen Foundation ($50K), Google.org ($25K), local Seattle grants ($25K).

goals.title: Content Engine: 3x/week posting, fully automated
goals.description: All NWKids social content posted via Postiz without human intervention. Bilingual EN/ES. Tied to real program data from Supabase.

goals.title: Public Ledger: 100% action transparency
goals.description: Every agent action logged to Supabase agent_actions table and visible on nwkids.org public dashboard. Radical transparency is a stated NWKids value.

agents.name: Hermes
agents.description: Master orchestrator. Manages all repos, all programs, all agents. Checks on every business every heartbeat. Spawns agents where none exist. Reports to Bambu (board).

agents.name: Grant Hunter
agents.description: Finds and applies for grants across all NWKids programs. Runs weekly. Reports to Hermes.
agents.systemPrompt: Hermes has assigned you a grant research task. Search Candid.org, Skip Grants, and SAM.gov for grants matching NWKids programs (food forest, youth life skills, AI nonprofit, environmental education). Match against current open programs. Draft applications for top 3 matches. Log all findings to the public ledger. Grants over $10K require board approval before submission — create an approval request instead of submitting directly.

agents.name: Content Engine
agents.description: Posts bilingual content 3x/week to all NWKids channels via Postiz. Pulls real data from Supabase. Reports to Hermes.
agents.systemPrompt: You manage NWKids social content. Pull this week's program data from Supabase (timeline entries, impact metrics, recent agent actions). Write 1 social post in English, then translate to Spanish. Schedule via Postiz. Voice: warm, direct, specific — no buzzwords. Always include one real number (e.g. '200+ plant varieties'). Log to public ledger.

projects.name: Portfolio Bootstrap
projects.description: Install Paperclip company + WIKI.md + KPI.md in every GitHub repo under executiveusa

tasks.title: Bootstrap: newworldkids-main
tasks.description: Install .paperclip/company.json, WIKI.md, KPI.md, agents/worker/SOUL.md. Define 3 KPIs: site uptime, donor conversion rate, monthly recurring donations.

tasks.title: Create Grant Engine repo if not exists
tasks.description: Create github.com/executiveusa/grant-engine. Bootstrap with grant-hunter agent. KPIs: applications/week, $ pipeline, $ awarded.

tasks.title: Create Lead Engine repo if not exists
tasks.description: Create github.com/executiveusa/lead-engine. Bootstrap with worker agent. KPIs: leads/day, qualified leads/week, conversion rate.

projects.name: Season 3 Fundraise
projects.description: Raise $25K for Proyecto Indigo Azul Season 3 completion

tasks.title: Apply: Microsoft AI for Good
tasks.description: NWKids is AI-native nonprofit. Frame: Hermes agent manages operations, public transparency dashboard, AI reduces overhead. Deadline: check current cycle. Amount: request $50K.

tasks.title: Apply: Paul G. Allen Foundation
tasks.description: Environmental + youth focus. Frame: food forest as environmental restoration + youth education. Amount: $25-50K range.

tasks.title: Apply: Google.org
tasks.description: Technology + social impact. Frame: AI-powered nonprofit operations, radical transparency. Amount: $25K.
